entry.title: New: BILL001(26) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE ESTABLISHMENT OF FEES AND CHARGES FOR SERVICES OF THE DEPARTMENT OF THE MEDICAL EXAMINER.

Establishes fees for non-mandated services provided by the City's Department of the Medical Examiner. "Non-Mandated Services" include services provided by court order.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
